name: Tribune Company
description: Tribune Company, formerly a major American media conglomerate, operated a diverse portfolio of television stations, newspapers, and digital assets. Following significant restructuring, including the spin-off of its publishing division into Tribune Publishing and the subsequent acquisition of Tribune Media by Nexstar Media Group in 2019, the company's legacy assets were integrated into a larger broadcasting network. Today, the entity associated with the TRBAA ticker represents the remnants of this historic media organization, which was once one of the largest and most influential media companies in the United States, headquartered in Chicago, Illinois.
